title: Dirt Update
description: Sort of a joke mod about dirt slabs, and stairs.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a96bb2353158803821fbce27dfb280fb0ffeca88.png)

**The mod no one asked for!**

This mod is very basic, all it adds is dirt slabs, stairs, glow dirt, frosted dirt, and cooked dirt.

## Features:

Dirt Stairs/Slabs: Basically what it implies, now you can make your dirt house more snazzy.

Recipe for Dirt Stairs:

![dirt stairs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0db620960890ea74f446a23a7cf239504815e8c8.png)

Recipe for Dirt Slabs:

![dirt stabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fba9e8ab43f7943a4808b829b5c8aee9b9ca140.png)

Frosted Dirt: Mix ice and Dirt and you get forever lasting dirt. Don't like your dirt turning into grass, then be my guest.

Recipe for Frosted Dirt:

![frosted dirt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a3cd0c3a3a941e000b3e585829d7b268769724c.png)

Alternate Recipe for Frosted Dirt:

![frosted dirt_2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03bb0b7c7b24d4abcfaa75e12cce32c76907ca5b.png)

Glow Dirt: Dirt mixed with glowstone, makes a quite wonderful light source.

Recipe for Glow Dirt:

![Crafting recipe Glow Dirt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55323380880f3f11f1241c5d59ccd719e9adcd33.png)
